title: Syria FM says Damascus open to talking to Hezbollah
gist: Syria's foreign minister signaled Damascus is open to talks with Hezbollah, while Iran warned against new attacks on its territory around Ayatollah Ali Khamenei's funeral.

insights.claim: Syria's foreign minister said Damascus is open to talking to Hezbollah.
insights.speaker: Al-Monitor
insights.so_what: A Syria-Hezbollah thaw would shift the Levant balance and Iran's regional network.

insights.claim: Iran warned against new attacks on its territory ahead of slain Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei's funeral.
insights.speaker: Al-Monitor
insights.so_what: Elevated Iran conflict risk around a leadership-transition flashpoint.
